children.heading: .—Academy
children.label: 1 .—Academy
children.text: The term “Academy” means the United States Merchant Marine Academy located at Kings Point, New York, and maintained under chapter 513 of this title.

children.heading: .—Cost of education provided
children.label: 2 .—Cost of education provided
children.text: The term “cost of education provided” means the financial costs incurred by the United States Government for providing training or financial assistance to students at the Academy and the State maritime academies, including direct financial assistance, room, board, classroom academics, and other training activities.

children.label: i
children.text: is of at least 1,000 gross tons as measured under or an alternate tonnage measured under as prescribed by the Secretary under ; andsection 14502 of this titlesection 14302 of this titlesection 14104 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: operates on the oceans or the Great Lakes; or

children.label: B
children.text: an engineer officer on a documented vessel propelled by machinery of at least 4,000 horsepower.

children.label: A
children.text: a State maritime academy or college sponsored by a State and assisted under chapter 515 of this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: a regional maritime academy or college sponsored by a group of States and assisted under chapter 515 of this title.
